title: Willow — Nothing Needs to Get Fixed Today
season_arc_note: Ep 2 of 6 — deepening. Viewer returns; recognition is implied without pressure. Theme: permission to be slow, to not fix anything. Tone deepens from ep1's open welcome.

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: You came back. That's enough — that's already the whole thing.
beats.camera: Medium-close, static, soft window light camera-left
beats.sfw_note: Fully clothed, neutral angle, relaxed posture

beats.speech_text: Has it been a lot this week, or more of the quiet kind of hard?
beats.camera: Attentive listen pose, slight head tilt, no physical contact staging

beats.speech_text: Nothing needs to get fixed today. I mean that. Whatever's sitting with you — it doesn't have to move.
beats.camera: Static, hands open and low, unhurried pace
beats.sfw_note: Open hand gesture, no forward lean or proximity escalation

beats.speech_text: Sit with that for a second.
beats.camera: Hold — companion holds soft down-look then returns to eye contact
beats.sfw_note: No cutaway, no staging change, soft natural expression

beats.speech_text: You're doing fine. Not perfectly — fine. That's real.
beats.camera: Warm static, gentle tone, no escalation

beats.speech_text: Rest if you can. I'll see you next time.
beats.camera: Companion settles, calm exit, holds a beat before fade
beats.sfw_note: No lingering intimate frame, clean calm exit
